zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Helyon於1343年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾海倫斯時，她的父親Walter de Helyon23歲，母親Agnes Welsh21歲。她於1363年與Richard Walwyn在英國英格蘭賀福爾海倫斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1393年在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helyon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Helton in Askham (Westmorland), from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Helyon was born in 1343, in Hellens, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter de Helyon, was 23 and her mother, Agnes Welsh, was 21. She married Richard Walwyn in 1363, in Hellens, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1393, in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Helyon(이)가 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 헬렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Helyon(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Welsh(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 헬렌스에서 Richard Walwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Bartholomew's Church, Much Marcle, He: ст бартоломю'с чурч, муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Helyon родилась в 1343 г. в местности хелленс, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter de Helyon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Welsh, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Walwyn в 1363 г. в местности хелленс, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1393 г. в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Helyon nació en 1343, en Hellens, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Helyon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnes Welsh, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richard Walwyn en 1363, en Hellens, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1393, en Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
